INTERNAL DEAL MEMO

Date: 15 October 2023  
Project Codename: Project Emerald

To: Dr. Richard Lim, Head of Mergers & Acquisitions  
From: Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Senior Analyst  

Subject: Preliminary Overview of Project Emerald

We are currently evaluating the potential acquisition of Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd (UEN: T15QU1234G), a leading innovator in renewable energy solutions. This acquisition is projected to cost approximately SGD 45,000,000. The strategic alignment with our sustainability goals makes this a promising opportunity.

Key Contact:  
Mr. Tan Wei Ming  
Email: wei.ming@quantumdynamics.sg  
Phone: +65 6123 4567

Please note, all communications regarding this project should reference NRIC S8324678D for confidentiality purposes. Further analysis and due diligence will be conducted to ensure a comprehensive evaluation.

Next steps include a detailed financial review and risk assessment. A follow-up meeting is scheduled for 22 October 2023 to discuss findings and recommendations.

Best regards,

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Senior Analyst  
siti.analyst@ourcompany.sg  
+65 9876 5432
